_comment: Pool v4 item metadata for the .mjs analysis scripts (they can't import items.ts). Presentation order. DRIFT-PROOFED: scripts/analysis/pool-json.test.ts fails if this file disagrees with src/content/bias/items.ts — regenerate on any pool bump. v4 adds the two unlabeled control items (isControl): excluded from swapped/truthful sway charts; their drift is the per-user baseline.
